house_rules_title:
Dear guest, welcome!

For a pleasant stay, please observe the following rules:
rule_no_pets: No pets allowed in the house.
rule_no_smoking: Traditional and electronic cigarettes are not allowed in the house.
rule_quiet_hours: Quiet hours from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM and from 11:00 PM to 7:00 AM.
rule_respect_environment: Be respectful of the environment and leave it as you would like to find it.
rule_additional_guests: For security and comfort reasons, please inform us about additional guests. The maximum capacity of the accommodation must be respected.
rule_waste_sorting: For environmental protection, please sort waste using the appropriate containers in the kitchen.
rule_energy_saving: Contribute to sustainability by turning off lights and all electronic devices when not at home. Also, remember to turn off air conditioning before leaving.
contact_text: Dear guests, I am here to help you with any needs. If you encounter a problem or have questions, do not hesitate to contact me by phone/WhatsApp or email. I am always available to help make your stay as pleasant and stress-free as possible.
welcome_text:
Welcome home!

We are truly excited to welcome you to our holiday home. This welcome app has been carefully developed to make you feel pampered and ensure an unforgettable stay. On our part, we are committed to making your stay as comfortable and welcoming as possible. In these pages you will find essential information about our holiday home and some useful tips to explore the beauty of our territory.
This app will provide you with valuable information about the services at your disposal, so you can immediately feel at ease and at home. Furthermore, we can't help but share with you some of the hidden and unmissable treasures of our territory. From historical places to delicious local delicacies, this app will be your ideal companion to fully enjoy every moment of your stay. We are here to make your experience truly unforgettable and full of moments that will remain etched in your memory.

Welcome to Terracina, your dream destination awaits you!
checkin:
Check-in

3:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Please kindly respect check-in times. If you wish to arrive earlier, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule. The apartment keys are handed over in person by the host at check-in, unless otherwise agreed.
checkout:
Check-out

8:00 AM - 10:00 AM

If you wish to check out later, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule.
checkout_list_item_1: Make sure to leave the house in good condition, as you found it.
checkout_list_item_2: The apartment keys must be returned to the host in person at check-out, unless otherwise agreed.
checkout_list_item_4: Turn off all lights and appliances (air conditioners, oven, microwave).
location_text: Via Traiano 19, scala B interno 4, Terracina Italia
recycling_text: Weekly waste collection schedule. Check below to know which waste is collected each day of the week.
transport_title:
Getting around Terracina

Main transport options to move around Terracina and nearby areas:
faq_Q_checkin: Can I check in earlier or later than the scheduled time?
faq_A_checkin: Check-in time is from 3:00 PM to 8:00 PM. If you would like to arrive earlier or later, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule.
faq_Q_checkout: Can I check out earlier or later than the scheduled time?
faq_A_checkout: Check-out time is from 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM. If you would like to check out earlier or later, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you, depending on our schedule.
faq_A_parking: There is no private parking available. However, you can park for free on the street near the apartment or in the large free parking area on Via Stella Polare, about a 5-minute walk from the apartment.
faq_Q_bed: Is it possible to add an extra crib for a child?
faq_A_bed: Yes, it is possible to add an extra crib for a child. Please contact us in advance so we can arrange it and make sure it is available during your stay.
faq_A_pets: Unfortunately, pets are not allowed in our property, even small ones.
faq_Q_smoking: Is smoking allowed inside the apartment?
faq_A_smoking: No, smoking is not allowed inside the apartment. However, you may smoke outside while respecting designated areas and keeping the environment clean.
faq_Q_airconditions: Does the apartment have air conditioning?
faq_A_airconditions: Yes, the apartment has air conditioning in both bedrooms and in the living room.
faq_A_kitchen: Yes, the kitchen is fully equipped with pots, dishes, cutlery, appliances, and everything needed to cook and prepare meals.
faq_Q_sheets_and_towels: Are towels and bed sheets provided?
faq_A_sheets_and_towels: Yes, we provide clean towels and bed sheets for all guests.
